title: STATE COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES

CHAPTER 5.  STATE COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES

PART I.  LEASE OF GROUNDS OF STATE COLLEGES

TO FRATERNAL AND OTHER ORGANIZATIONS

§1651.  §§1651 to 1655 Repealed by Acts 1975, No. 313, §3, eff. July 17, 1975.
